name: Poke Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 9-Inch Round White Cake Layers, baked & cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cake layers, top sides up, in two 9-inch cake pans.
2. Pierce the cake with a large fork at 1/2-inch intervals.
3. Stir 1 cup of boiling water into each flavor gelatin in separate bowls until completely dissolved.
4. Carefully pour one flavor over each cake layer.
5. Refrigerate for 3 hours.
6. Dip 1 cake pan in warm water for 10 seconds and unmold onto a serving plate.
7. Spread about 1 cup of whipped topping on the cake.
8. Unmold the second layer and place it on top of the first layer.
9. Frost with remaining Cool Whip.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
